creator: moiseev@mezonplus.ru
text:
Created attachment 165183
Update to 1.1.3 & other fixes

- Update 1.0.0 -> 1.1.3 (moved to GitHub)
- Keep edited configuration file on port deinstallation
- Add NO_ARCH
- Update LICENSE
- Fix x-generate-plist target (remove deprecated @dirrm)

If you have no objections I'd like to keep x-generate-plist target for this port. It just adds @sample macro now.
